ground_truth.title: Short-Term Fitness Rentals
ground_truth.main_content:
Short-Term Fitness Rentals
Used Gym Equipment Is Your Source for Short-Term Fitness Rentals
Are you a set director tired of the limited selection of outdated, rusty equipment at your local prop house? Are you an event manager that can’t find anyone that can deliver the gym equipment you need for a convention booth or corporate event? You’ve come to the right place! Used Gym Equipment has been providing high end commercial grade fitness equipment to Southern California and beyond for over 20 years. We offer great rental deals on a wide array of high-quality exercise equipment by the top brands. Whether you need a few cardio machines or a complete gym’s worth of premium equipment, we can meet your needs quickly and efficiently.
Why Choose Used Gym Equipment for Your Gym Rentals
A 20-year fitness industry veteran, Used Gym Equipment is your one-stop shop for short and long-term gym equipment rentals in Los Angeles and beyond. Keep reading to discover why customers consistently choose to rent from us instead of the competition:
Multiple Rental Period Options
We understand that our clients have varying needs when it comes to fitness rentals. Whether you’re looking for a short-term rental to accommodate a special event or a longer rental in order to film a movie or TV show, our team can meet your needs quickly and affordably. For our customers’ convenience, we offer daily, weekly, and month-to-month rentals of our cardio and strength equipment. Together, we’ll build a custom package to meet your goals.
Wide Range of Gym Machines
Used Gym Equipment’s extensive machine selection is just one of the many reasons for our success in the industry. With a large warehouse facility, we have plenty of space to stock a wide assortment of strength and cardio equipment, so you don’t have to wait around for items to arrive. Here are just a few of the machines and supplies we have on hand:
Need a piece of equipment you don’t see listed above? Don’t hesitate to give us a call to see if we have it in stock.
Higher-Quality Exercise Equipment
Don’t settle for home-grade equipment for your film shoot or event! The last thing you want is for your rental equipment to break down in the middle of an event or during a big film shoot. At Used Gym Equipment, we stock only the highest-quality fitness equipment by name-brand suppliers like Precor, Life Fitness, Stairmaster, and Matrix. We refurbish pre-owned equipment using brand-new parts. As a result, our pieces are rock-solid and sure to hold up despite everyday wear and tear.
Support With Installation
When you choose Used Gym Equipment as your fitness rental company, you can breathe a sigh of relief knowing you won’t be left to install and set up machines on your own. Our staff possesses the knowledge and training needed to install your machines and teach you techniques for operating them safely and correctly. Additionally, we take time to test run your equipment upon dropping it off. We won’t leave until we (and you) are assured that everything is operating at peak performance.
Is your film shoot or corporate event coming up soon? Contact us today so we can discuss your requirements. We’re eager to answer your questions and support you every step of the way. Our sales representatives have the knowledge and training to discuss the details of your proposal, including freight and delivery needs.To learn more about our services, call today or contact Used Gym Equipment online.
